---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new for the workflow, crew, or scripts
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<What's missing or awkward today? Concrete situation, not just "would be nice".>

## Proposed solution

<What you'd want instead. If it's a new agent, a new hook, or a new script,
say which — check ROADMAP.md first, this may already be tracked.>

## Alternatives considered

<Other ways to solve the same problem, and why this one's better.>

## Fit with the zero-dependency law

<Does this need a new runtime dependency? (CONTRIBUTING.md: PRs adding npm/pip
runtime deps are closed with love — bash + git + optional jq/python3 only.)
If it genuinely can't be done in bash, say so explicitly — that's useful
information even if the answer is "then it doesn't fit".>
